item.title: The Tension That Defines Modern Life
item.description: Most people need a smartphone. But many want to use it less.
item.dc:creator: Julie Beck

item.title: Homophobia Is Back. It’s Different Now.
item.description: Americans are burned-out, frustrated, and hunting for scapegoats.
item.dc:creator: Spencer Kornhaber

item.title: Who Needs Tanks in the Age of Drones?
item.description: Ukrainian drones have made artillery and armored vehicles look obsolete. Why is the world still buying them?
item.dc:creator: Simon Shuster

item.title: A Radical Message for a Kids’ Movie
item.description: Hoppersoffers a surprisingly progressive take on the typical talking-animal story.
item.dc:creator: David Sims

item.title: Shockingly, ICE Hasn’t Fixed the Airport Crisis
item.description: Perhaps because they're not trained to expedite the long lines
item.dc:creator: Alexandra Petri

item.title: Critics Have a New Way to Describe the Trump Administration
item.description: Calling his presidency a “regime” has some benefits, but it underestimates the resilience of the 250-year-old republic.
item.dc:creator: David A. Graham

item.title: Welcome to a Multidimensional Economic Disaster
item.description: The AI boom wasn’t built for the polycrisis.
item.dc:creator: Matteo Wong

item.title: A Turning Point in the Iran War
item.description: The president is discovering the high stakes of an escalation that damages energy facilities.
item.dc:creator: Shane Harris

item.title: The Countdown to a Ground War
item.description: The president wants to avoid a long, messy entanglement, but all of the ground options promise to be just that.
item.dc:creator: Thomas Wright

item.title: Today’sAtlanticTrivia: AI Code, Airport Code
item.description: Test your knowledge—and read our stories for a little extra help.
item.dc:creator: Drew Goins

item.title: The Evidence That God Exists
item.description: Searching for scientific proof for faith misunderstands faith.
item.dc:creator: Elizabeth Bruenig

item.title: Is The End of NATO Near?
item.description: The alliance has been battered by Trump’s threats.
item.dc:creator: Jonathan Lemire

item.title: A Life of Paying Attention
item.description: Revisiting Tracy Kidder’s work forThe Atlantic
item.dc:creator: Rafaela Jinich

item.title: A Novel About Women Who Trade One Kind of Captivity for Another
item.description: In Charlotte Wood’sThe Natural Way of Things, a group of captive women discover who they might become beyond the control of men.
item.dc:creator: Robert Rubsam

item.title: ICE Might Be Violating America’s Other Bill of Rights
item.description: To keep rogue agents in check, we need to look beyond the Constitution.
item.dc:creator: Priyanka Menon

item.title: The Worst Airport in America
item.description: Traveling by plane anywhere is bad right now, but in some places, it’s worse.
item.dc:creator: Ellen Cushing

item.title: What Was Clavicular?
item.description: The internet’s most famous looks-maxxer is far more pernicious than he may seem.
item.dc:creator: Will Gottsegen

item.title: The Immigration Restriction Trump Won’t Try
item.description: Focusing enforcement on employers might be the easiest choice in immigration policy—after all the hard ones are made.
item.dc:creator: Marc Novicoff

item.title: Protecting a Hero Too Long
item.description: The pressure to shield men who hurt women
item.dc:creator: Jenisha Watts

item.title: Meet the New ICE
item.dc:creator: Hanna Rosin
